title: Standardize observedGeneration on sub-reconciler conditions
summary: Addresses all three INFO findings from berendt's external review: (1) expanded database ObservedGeneration test from 2 to 5 paths (ClusterNotReady, WaitingForDatabase, DBSyncFailed, SchemaDriftDetected, DatabaseSynced), (2) expanded secrets ObservedGeneration test from 2 to 4 paths covering all SetCondition call sites (SecretStoreNotReady, WaitingForDBCredentials, WaitingForAdminCredentials, SecretsAvailable), (3) documentation clarified that integration_test.go ObservedGeneration coverage is pre-existing. Tests pass, go vet clean, golangci-lint clean on changed files.

tests_checklist.item: Assertions use distinct non-default generation values
Both True and False condition paths tested
Test names accurately describe coverage scope

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns within each file
Reuses existing test helpers (newDBTestReconciler, readyDatabase, buildUser, etc.)
No code duplication beyond acceptable test setup
Test comments accurately describe each path

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
